seo.title: Taxi car rental and driver opportunities for Bolt and Uber in Rzeszów
seo.description: We offer modern taxi cars and transparent partnership terms for Bolt and Uber drivers in Rzeszów.

items.title: Complete onboarding
items.text: We provide full training on how to use the Bolt and Uber apps.

items.title: 0% VAT on tips and bonuses
items.text: All tips and bonuses go directly to you.

items.title: Medical exam reimbursement
items.text: We reimburse medical exam costs once the conditions are met.

rentCar.title: Rent a car and work with Bolt / Uber without owning a vehicle
rentCar.text: We provide a car fully prepared for work. You drive and earn — we handle the rest.

benefits.title: No upfront investment
benefits.text: Start working with no initial fees and no mandatory deposit.

benefits.title: Work-ready vehicle
benefits.text: Hybrid cars with LPG and automatic transmission, fully prepared for taxi work.

benefits.title: Option to work without commission
benefits.text: Competitive conditions designed with drivers in mind.

benefits.title: Fast start
benefits.text: You can start working within just a few days.

cta.label: View rental terms
cta.hint: See available cars, costs, and step-by-step rules.

fleetCar.title: Work with our car — become a Ginger Partner driver
fleetCar.text: Get a company car and earn by completing rides with Bolt or Uber.

benefits.title: Company car
benefits.text: No personal investment — receive a fully prepared vehicle.

benefits.title: All expenses covered by us
benefits.text: Maintenance, fuel, car washes, and ongoing operating costs.

benefits.title: Flexible schedule
benefits.text: A schedule tailored to you — no mandatory shifts or minimum quotas.

benefits.title: 24/7 support
benefits.text: Constant contact and operational support around the clock.

cta.label: Check driver terms
cta.hint: Check the details and apply in just a few minutes.

driverCar.title: Work with Bolt / Uber using your own car
driverCar.text: Join our fleet as a driver with your own vehicle and benefit from transparent settlement terms.

benefits.title: Higher income
benefits.text: Earn more with your own car — with the option to work without commission.

benefits.title: Save more
benefits.text: We refund 50% of VAT included in fuel expenses.

benefits.title: Regular payouts
benefits.text: Receive your payment no later than Tuesday each week.

benefits.title: Operational support
benefits.text: Support at every stage of cooperation.

cta.label: Check partnership terms
cta.hint: Learn the details and apply online in just a few minutes.

cta.title: What do you need to start working as a driver?

criminal.title: Criminal record certificate
criminal.text: You can obtain this document from the court or the National Criminal Register. Valid for 30 days.

medical.title: Medical and psychological examinations
medical.text: We will recommend trusted clinics where you can complete the required exams.

photo.title: Polish driving licence
photo.text: A valid Polish category B driving licence is required.

contactForm.title: Leave your contact details — we’ll handle the rest
contactForm.subtitle: Provide your name, phone number, and city. We will call you back and help you get started quickly.
contactForm.consent: I agree to the processing of my personal data
contactForm.success: Your application has been sent. We will contact you soon.
contactForm.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
